chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-185 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 569/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 570/25 4.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Badhani, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Through instant petition, petitioner seeks direction to official respondents to provide protection and not to cause any sort of harassment to him and his family at the behest of private respondents. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG and Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant A.G present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submit that official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Since the right of protection of every citizen including the petitioner is the fundamental right protected and guaranteed under the Constitution of Pakistan; therefore, official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. However, it is made clear that this order shall not come in the way either in criminal, civil or family cases, if pending between both the parties before the competent Courts of law. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
